channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Administration declines new bids for Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool repairs
item.description: The article discusses the U.S. government's decision not to pursue new bids for repairing the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, which was damaged by vandalism. President Donald Trump claimed multiple ...

item.title: Technical Issue: Access Blocked for Non-Crawler Users
item.description: News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites, resulting in some users being blocked. If you're encountering this issue and are not a crawler bot, follow t...

item.title: President Cyril Ramaphosa Opens First Google Cloud Summit in Africa
item.description: The first Google Cloud Summit in Africa commenced on July 1, 2026, at the Sandton Convention Centre in Gauteng, officiated by South African President Cyril Ramaphosa. This event marks a significant mi...

item.title: Spain Defeats Portugal 1-0 in FIFA World Cup Round of 16 Match
item.description: In a tightly contested FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 clash between Spain and Portugal, Spain secured a 1-0 victory thanks to a last-minute goal from Mikel Merino in the 90th minute. The match, held ...

item.title: Russia's Shadow Fleet Tests NATO Drone Defenses with Unmanned Aerial Campaign
item.description: A new report by the International Institute for Strategic Studies (IISS) reveals Russia's use of a 'shadow fleet' of sanctioned-busting ships to launch drone operations across Europe, testing NATO's a...

item.title: Trump Administration Promotes AI Despite Internal Warnings of Economic Risks
item.description: A leaked Treasury Department internal report warns that generative AI companies pose significant risks to the U.S. economy, yet President Donald Trump's administration continues to champion AI initiat...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's high-profile wedding: Chaos, ranking system, and guest complaints
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's July 3 wedding at Madison Square Garden in New York sparked mixed reactions from guests, who described the event as 'tacky' and 'chaotic'. The ceremony, officiated by a...

item.title: World Bank Initiative Combines Early Childhood Education with Gender Violence Prevention in Tanzania
item.description: A World Bank initiative in Tanzania is taking a dual approach to social development by combining early childhood education programs with efforts to combat gender-based violence, creating a comprehensi...

item.title: Planning Authority Faces Complex Challenges in Streamlining Approvals
item.description: The Planning Authority in Canberra is grappling with significant challenges as the city's rapid growth strains its complex planning system. Industry stakeholders report extended wait times for develop...

item.title: Kylian Mbappe Condemns Paraguayan Senator's Racist Remarks
item.description: French soccer star Kylian Mbappe has strongly condemned a Paraguayan senator's racist remarks following France's World Cup victory over Paraguay. The controversy erupted after Paraguayan Sen. Celeste ...

item.title: Lara's Resentment Toward Datu Rahman Leads to Her Downfall in 'Blood vs Duty'
item.description: The article explores the tragic arc of Lara Angeles in the TV series 'Blood vs Duty,' focusing on how her unresolved resentment toward Datu Rahman ultimately led to her downfall. Set against a backdro...

item.title: CMS Justifies 9.5% Gems Contribution Hike Amid Affordability Concerns
item.description: The Council for Medical Schemes (CMS) has defended its decision to maintain a 9.5% contribution increase for the Government Employees Medical Scheme (Gems), arguing that reducing it to 7.5% would jeop...

item.title: National Workshop on Tribal Research Institutes to Launch TribeX Digital Platform for Preserving Tribal Heritage
item.description: The Union Ministry of Tribal Affairs is organizing a two-day national workshop in Bhubaneswar starting Tuesday, July 6, 2026, to strengthen Tribal Research Institutes (TRIs) across India. The event wi...

item.title: Trump's Interference in World Cup Highlights Concerns Over Fair Play
item.description: The article critiques former US President Donald Trump's intervention in a World Cup match, arguing that his actions undermine the integrity of sports. It draws parallels between Trump's political beh...

item.title: Canada Selects German Firm for Submarine Fleet Over South Korea
item.description: The Canadian government has chosen Germany's TKMS to construct its first significant submarine fleet, favoring NATO allies and European partners over South Korea's Hanwha. Prime Minister Mark Carney a...

item.title: Tinubu probes Meta, Google, X over news content exploitation
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has directed the Federal Competition and Consumer Protection Commission (FCCPC) to investigate major tech giants like Meta, Google, and X over allegations of exploiting Nigerian ...

item.title: Hamas dissolves Gaza government as US-backed peace plan faces Israeli backlash
item.description: Hamas has announced the dissolution of its de facto government in the Gaza Strip, citing a step toward implementing a US-backed peace plan. The move, part of a broader agreement brokered after a fragi...

item.title: Regina YMCA criticizes NDP for failing to consult daycare providers before sending letter to Ottawa
item.description: The Regina YMCA has accused the New Democratic Party (NDP) of neglecting to engage with daycare providers when drafting a letter sent to Ottawa. The organization claims that the lack of consultation r...

item.title: Quezon municipal workers subjected to drug testing initiative
item.description: The Infanta town government, in coordination with the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency and other partner agencies, conducted an unannounced drug test on 620 municipal workers, including job order, c...

item.title: Khanna and Gallego Withdraw Endorsement from Graham Platner Amid Sexual Assault Allegations
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna and Sen. Ruben Gallego have rescinded their support of Graham Platner, a Democratic candidate for Maine's Senate race, following allegations of sexual assault. The decision comes after ...
